headline: Could Howmet Aerospace (HWM) Be A Beneficiary Of SpaceX IPO?
summary: Howmet Aerospace Inc. (NYSE:HWM) is one of the 10 Best Stocks to Buy Before SpaceX IPO. On April 10, Charles Minervino, an analyst at Susquehanna, while maintaining a Buy rating, set a target price of $300 on Howmet Aerospace Inc. (NYSE:HWM) stock. The firm’s price target reflects a further 17% upside from the current levels. […]

headline: Baird Trims Stanley Black & Decker (SWK) PT on Weak Channel Checks
summary: Stanley Black & Decker, Inc. (NYSE:SWK) is included among the 10 Best Dividend Aristocrat Stocks to Buy in 2026. On April 21, Timothy Wojs at Baird lowered the price recommendation on Stanley Black & Decker, Inc. (NYSE:SWK) to $82 from $85. It reiterated a Neutral rating on the shares.
